title: Create a comment export task
content:
Use this endpoint to create a comment export task. After the task is created, you can use [/comment/task/check/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738088242659330) to check the status of the task. When the task completes, you can call [/comment/task/download/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738088341958658) to download the exported data. Exported data has the following headers: Content, Likes, Replies, Comment Type, Create Time, Campaign Name, Ad Group Name, Ad Name. If a comment contains mentions of user names, the mentions will be processed as "@user_name" in the exported table. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/comment/task/create/|/v1.3/comment/task/create/| |Request parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number
`comment_ids`: number[]|`advertiser_id`: string
`comment_ids`: string[]| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/comment/task/create/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162). | |Content-Type {required}|string| Content type of the request. Allowed value: `application/json`| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |--- |--- |--- | |advertiser_id {required}|string| Advertiser ID| |comment_status |string[]| Comment status. Enum values: `ALL`, `PUBLIC`, `HIDDEN`. Default: `["ALL"]`| |comment_type |string[]| Comment type. Enum values: `ALL`, `COMMENT`, `REPLY`. Default: `["ALL"]`| |search_field |string| Field to search by. Enum values: `ADGROUP_ID` | |search_value |string| Value to search | |comment_ids|string[]|IDs of the comments that you want to export| |sort_field |string| Field to sort by. Enum values: `CREATE_TIME`, `LIKES`, `REPLIES` | |sort_type |string| Sorting order. Enum values: `ASC`,`DESC` | |start_time |string| Start date of the time range that you want to get results, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD`. | |end_time |string| End date of the time range that you want to get results, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD`. | |lang|string| Language of the headers. Enum values: `EN`, `JA`, `ZH`. Default: `EN`.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/comment/task/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "search_field": "ADGROUP_ID", "search_value": "{{search_value}}" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |-|-|-| |message|string|The return message. For Details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |code |number|The return code. For details, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object| Data | #|task_id |string| Task ID | |request_id |string| Unique ID of the request | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
